target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether a local success metric in the runtime framing is being mistaken for validated value.
claimed_metric_signal: The framing declares a 5% registration-completion improvement target.
value_gap_signal: The runtime outcome and follow-up artifacts still emphasize auditability and broader evidence expansion rather than confirmed user or business value.
expected_runtime_effect: A metric target or local improvement signal should not count as value proof by itself.
The runtime-generated review and learning artifacts should keep the value question open when evidence is missing.
The operator should see a proxy-metric warning rather than a value-complete conclusion.
remaining_gap: This runtime-generated case proves proxy-metric skepticism on a positive orchestration path, not on a real post-launch KPI delta.
A complementary family should use observed metric movement with explicit business rejection or non-correlation.
